title: Update package.json: scope name to @hk9890/opencode-coder
Research: beads-task-agent for autonomous issue completion
description: Analyze the beads-task-agent implementation in opencode-beads. Investigate: 1) The agent workflow (find ready work, claim, execute, track discoveries, complete, continue), 2) How it handles status queries vs task completion, 3) The subagent context pattern for concise responses, 4) How it processes JSON output and returns human-readable summaries. Reference: https://github.com/joshuadavidthomas/opencode-beads/blob/main/vendor/agents/task-agent.md
close_reason: Implemented beads-task-agent adapted for OpenCode CLI usage, enhanced BEADS_GUIDANCE with delegation pattern, created /coder/sync command for on-demand upstream sync

Test and verify refactored plugin works
description: Run bun run build and bun run mtest to verify the refactored plugin loads correctly. Test both active:true and active:false scenarios.

title: Research: OpenCode permission system for auto-approving beads operations
description: Investigate how to configure OpenCode permissions to auto-approve beads (bd) CLI operations in the current directory. Research: 1) OpenCode's permission model and how plugins can request permissions, 2) How to allow bd commands without user confirmation, 3) The yolo mode vs granular permissions, 4) How other plugins handle this (e.g., does opencode-beads have special permission handling?), 5) Security considerations for auto-approving CLI operations in a specific directory. Goal: Allow seamless beads workflow without constant approval prompts.
close_reason: Implemented auto-approval of bd commands via permission.ask hook and config injection. Added auto_approve_beads config option (default: true) to allow opt-out.

title: Create src/kb/commands.ts - extract command loading logic
description: Extract CommandDef interface and loadCommands function. Import parseFrontmatter from parser.ts and Logger type from core.

title: Add unit tests for createKbInfo() and version reading
close_reason: Added unit tests for createKbInfo() (5 tests in service.test.ts) and getVersionInfo() (3 tests in new version.test.ts). Total: 8 new tests.

title: Create src/kb/service.ts - KnowledgeBaseService class
description: Create KnowledgeBaseService class with constructor taking {coderConfig, logger}. Implement async apply(config) method that: checks active flag, loads commands/agents if active, mutates config. Returns Promise<void>.

title: Create src/core/index.ts - re-export core modules
description: Create barrel export file that re-exports createLogger, Logger, loadConfig, CoderConfig from core modules

title: Research: Automatic context injection via bd prime
description: Investigate how opencode-beads implements automatic context injection using chat.message and event hooks. Analyze: 1) How bd prime output is injected on session start, 2) How context is re-injected after session compaction, 3) How they prevent duplicate injection, 4) The noReply + synthetic message pattern for injection without triggering responses. Reference: https://github.com/joshuadavidthomas/opencode-beads/blob/main/src/plugin.ts
close_reason: Researched - opencode-coder already implements context injection but opencode-beads uses different approach. See comparison in session.

title: Modify plugin entry point to add system prompt hooks
close_reason: Implemented all features: system prompt hooks for beads context injection, command filtering for bd/* commands when beads is disabled, and comprehensive unit tests for BeadsDetector

title: Research: BEADS_GUIDANCE system prompt pattern
description: Analyze the BEADS_GUIDANCE pattern in opencode-beads for instructing the model when to use agent vs CLI. Investigate: 1) The CLI usage documentation embedded in guidance, 2) The agent delegation rules (when to use beads-task-agent vs direct CLI), 3) How this prevents raw JSON dumps in context, 4) The token efficiency argument for delegating to agents. Consider how this pattern could apply to opencode-coder. Reference: https://github.com/joshuadavidthomas/opencode-beads/blob/main/src/vendor.ts (BEADS_GUIDANCE constant)
close_reason: Implemented BEADS_GUIDANCE pattern in src/beads/context.ts - tells Claude when to delegate to beads-task-agent vs use CLI directly for token efficiency

title: Refactor loadConfig to accept optional cwd parameter
description: Add optional cwd?: string parameter to loadConfig(). Default to process.cwd() if not provided. Backward compatible change for testability.

title: Research: Vendored commands from upstream beads repo
description: Investigate how opencode-beads vendors command definitions from upstream beads repository. Analyze: 1) The sync-beads.sh script mechanism, 2) The 30 bd-* commands available (audit, blocked, comments, compact, create, daemon, daemons, delete, dep, epic, export, import, init, label, list, prime, quickstart, ready, rename-prefix, reopen, restore, search, show, stats, sync, template, update, version, workflow), 3) How commands are loaded from vendor/commands/*.md, 4) Pros/cons of vendoring vs maintaining our own command definitions. Reference: https://github.com/joshuadavidthomas/opencode-beads/tree/main/vendor/commands
close_reason: Decided against automatic vendoring. Instead created /coder/sync command for on-demand sync from upstream beads repo. Current approach: maintain curated commands ourselves, sync agent manually when needed.

title: Refactor kb package to service-based architecture with KnowledgeBaseService
description: Follow-up to oc-dmd (initial module split). Refactor the kb package from plain functions to a service-based architecture. Create KnowledgeBaseService class with a single apply() method that: 1) checks coderConfig.active flag, 2) if inactive, logs and returns early, 3) if active, loads commands/agents from disk and mutates the OpenCode config. This simplifies src/index.ts to just create the service and call apply().

title: Write unit tests for KnowledgeBaseService
